race.description: S&S Equipment Rental & Sales Maiden Plate
race.comment: Wide open but on best figures MISS LOLA (10) should go close. All form has been in NSW, placing in four of seven and in far richer maidens in Sydney. First try in this area and is yet to see soft ground but hard to beat on almost any of the figures returned so far. FEAR THE IMPACT (1) was put away after a debut fifth, then returned finishing runner-up last time. Wound up strongly and fitter again looks a top chance to break through. THINK ABOUT HER (12) is a well-related three-year-old filly on debut. By So You Think from Sultah and plenty of winners in the family. Well educated and off a low draw. Watch the market closely. REAL HEIR (5) has fitness and was beaten only a length in a richer maiden latest. Among the main chances.
